subject: FW: VS
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Farkas, Andrew L. [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Friday, March 14, 2008 1:28 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: VS



Someone within the Sultanic universe has emerged to deliver the
following message:  According to Bob Ross, Divisional President for
Internat'l matters, VS is VERY, VERY close to siging an exclusive
agreement regarding the distribution of VS in the GCC with a company in
DXB called, Apparel Group.  Further he has indicated that while close
(i.e. many drafts already exchanged) they have not yet signed this
agreement, and would be open to discussions with Nakheel et al if they
felt that Nakheel (Sultan's group) was sincerely interested.  They said
that they had been unaware that Nakheel was interested until this
contact (I do not know with whom they spoke specifically) and that's why
they had been proceding with the other company.

As you know, controlling VS in the GCC is VERY near and dear to the
heart of our friend and, frankly, he is the righrt guy.  COuld any of
this be true?  Should I contact this Bob Ross directly?  What to do?
That's why I called today.

________________________________

 
The information contained in this message and any attachment to it may
be privileged, confidential or otherwise protected from disclosure. If
you are not the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any
dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly
prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please
notify the sender immediately by replying to the message and please
delete it from your system. Please also note that any views or opinions
presented in this email are solely those of the author and do not
necessarily represent those of the company.
